'''âz-h-zh''' ('''kazahazh''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quadreble|quadreble]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-h-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quadreble|quadreble]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âz-h-zh
|-
! Lemma
| kazahazh
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizahazh|thizahazh]] || [[word:jizahazh|jizahazh]] || [[word:shizahazh|shizahazh]] || [[word:kizahazh|kizahazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzahazh|thuthuzahazh]] || [[word:jujuzahazh|jujuzahazh]] || [[word:shushuzahazh|shushuzahazh]] || [[word:kukuzahazh|kukuzahazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuzahazh|thuzahazh]] || [[word:juzahazh|juzahazh]] || [[word:shuzahazh|shuzahazh]] || [[word:kuzahazh|kuzahazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzahazh|thuzahazh]] || [[word:juzahazh|juzahazh]] || [[word:shuzahazh|shuzahazh]] || [[word:kuzahazh|kuzahazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thezahazh|thezahazh]] || [[word:jezahazh|jezahazh]] || [[word:shezahazh|shezahazh]] || [[word:kezahazh|kezahazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothozahazh|thothozahazh]] || [[word:jojozahazh|jojozahazh]] || [[word:shoshozahazh|shoshozahazh]] || [[word:kokozahazh|kokozahazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozahazh|thozahazh]] || [[word:jozahazh|jozahazh]] || [[word:shozahazh|shozahazh]] || [[word:kozahazh|kozahazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozahazh|thozahazh]] || [[word:jozahazh|jozahazh]] || [[word:shozahazh|shozahazh]] || [[word:kozahazh|kozahazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠzahazh|thĂŠzahazh]] || [[word:jĂŠzahazh|jĂŠzahazh]] || [[word:shĂŠzahazh|shĂŠzahazh]] || [[word:kĂŠzahazh|kĂŠzahazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathazahazh|thathazahazh]] || [[word:jajazahazh|jajazahazh]] || [[word:shashazahazh|shashazahazh]] || [[word:kakazahazh|kakazahazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazahazh|thazahazh]] || [[word:jazahazh|jazahazh]] || [[word:shazahazh|shazahazh]] || [[word:kazahazh|kazahazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazahazh|thazahazh]] || [[word:jazahazh|jazahazh]] || [[word:shazahazh|shazahazh]] || [[word:kazahazh|kazahazh]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shazahazh|shazahazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshazahazh|goshazahazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishazahazh|gokishazahazh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shazahazhnĂŒ|shazahazhnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshazahazhnknĂŒ|goshazahazhnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishazahazhnĂŒ|gokishazahazhnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shazahazhshĂ«|shazahazhshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshazahazhnkshĂ«|goshazahazhnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishazahazhshĂ«|gokishazahazhshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazahazhro|shazahazhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazahazhnkro|goshazahazhnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazahazhro|gokishazahazhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shazahazhmu|shazahazhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazahazhnkmu|goshazahazhnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazahazhmu|gokishazahazhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shazahazhsher|shazahazhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshazahazhnksher|goshazahazhnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishazahazhsher|gokishazahazhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shazahazhng|shazahazhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshazahazhnkng|goshazahazhnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishazahazhng|gokishazahazhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shazahazhya|shazahazhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshazahazhnkya|goshazahazhnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishazahazhya|gokishazahazhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shazahazhyam|shazahazhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshazahazhnkyam|goshazahazhnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishazahazhyam|gokishazahazhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazahazhnĂŒshĂ«|shazahazhnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazahazhnknĂŒshĂ«|goshazahazhnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazahazhnĂŒshĂ«|gokishazahazhnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazahazhnĂŒro|shazahazhnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazahazhnknĂŒro|goshazahazhnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazahazhnĂŒro|gokishazahazhnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazahazhnĂŒmu|shazahazhnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazahazhnknĂŒmu|goshazahazhnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazahazhnĂŒmu|gokishazahazhnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazahazhshĂ«nĂŒ|shazahazhshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazahazhnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshazahazhnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazahazhshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishazahazhshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazahazhshĂ«ro|shazahazhshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazahazhnkshĂ«ro|goshazahazhnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazahazhshĂ«ro|gokishazahazhshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazahazhshĂ«mu|shazahazhshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazahazhnkshĂ«mu|goshazahazhnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazahazhshĂ«mu|gokishazahazhshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazahazhronĂŒ|shazahazhronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazahazhnkronĂŒ|goshazahazhnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazahazhronĂŒ|gokishazahazhronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazahazhroshĂ«|shazahazhroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazahazhnkroshĂ«|goshazahazhnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazahazhroshĂ«|gokishazahazhroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazahazhromu|shazahazhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazahazhnkromu|goshazahazhnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazahazhromu|gokishazahazhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazahazhmunĂŒ|shazahazhmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazahazhnkmunĂŒ|goshazahazhnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazahazhmunĂŒ|gokishazahazhmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazahazhmushĂ«|shazahazhmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazahazhnkmushĂ«|goshazahazhnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazahazhmushĂ«|gokishazahazhmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazahazhmuro|shazahazhmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazahazhnkmuro|goshazahazhnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazahazhmuro|gokishazahazhmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
